title: campanula dasyantha
intro: Campanula dasyantha, also known as Bellflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This perennial plant is native to the mountainous regions of the Balkans and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Campanula dasyantha include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Campanula dasyantha can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots and leaves can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
